problem id: 929bbda5
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(3) AND NOT SHR(4)) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  00100110 -> 01001110
  10011110 -> 10001011
  11011010 -> 10101101
  00110010 -> 11101111
  10111111 -> 11001011
  01100100 -> 11011110
  01101001 -> 11110110
  11001011 -> 01101101
  10101000 -> 10111010
  11100010 -> 01101110

query: 11111001
predicted answer: 01111111
